scenes.text:
Lavender
 * Location: Found exclusively in the Lavender Plains biome.
 * Usage: Drop this fragrant flower to collect it. When placed in a Brewing Stand as a Reagent with a Water Bottle, it creates a soothing Lavender Brew.
Onion
 * Type: A versatile Crop that can be eaten raw to restore hunger.
 * Brewing: Harvest the bulb and use it as a Reagent with a Water Bottle to craft a savory Onion Brew.
Rose Bush
 * Location: Native to the Rose Bush Plains.
 * Brewing: These tall blooms act as a Reagent in the Brewing Stand. Combine one with a Water Bottle to produce a floral Rose Brew.
Lumi Lily
 * Discovery: A rare ancient plant that can only be found when a Sniffer digs it up from the earth.
 * Brewing: This glowing lily serves as a powerful Reagent. Mix it with a Water Bottle to create the luminous Lumi Lily Brew.
Jasmine
 * Location: Scarsely scattered throughout Flower Forests and Plains.
 * Brewing: Use these delicate white petals as a Reagent with a Water Bottle to brew a light Jasmine Brew.
